topics.title: Driving
topics.content: Always check mirrors before turning.

topics.title: Speed
topics.content: Follow Irish road speed limits.

topics.title: Mirrors
topics.content: Use MSM routine: Mirror, Signal, Manoeuvre before changing direction.

topics.title: Indicators
topics.content: Always signal in advance to inform other road users of your intention.

topics.title: Stopping
topics.content: Check mirrors before slowing down or stopping.

topics.title: Braking
topics.content: Brake gently and progressively to avoid sudden stops.

topics.title: Junctions
topics.content: Approach junctions slowly and be prepared to stop if necessary.

topics.title: Roundabouts
topics.content: Yield to traffic coming from the right and choose correct lane.

topics.title: Lane Discipline
topics.content: Stay in your lane and avoid unnecessary lane changes.

topics.title: Overtaking
topics.content: Only overtake when it is safe and legal to do so.

topics.title: Parking
topics.content: Always check surroundings and use mirrors when parking.

topics.title: Reverse
topics.content: Look all around and move slowly while reversing.

topics.title: Pedestrians
topics.content: Always give way to pedestrians at crossings.

topics.title: Cyclists
topics.content: Maintain safe distance and be cautious around cyclists.

topics.title: Weather
topics.content: Adjust speed and increase stopping distance in bad weather.

topics.title: Fog
topics.content: Use fog lights and drive slowly in low visibility.

topics.title: Night Driving
topics.content: Use dipped headlights when driving at night or in poor visibility.

topics.title: Headlights
topics.content: Switch on headlights in low light conditions.

topics.title: Seatbelt
topics.content: Always wear seatbelt before starting the car.

topics.title: Mobile Phones
topics.content: Do not use mobile phones while driving unless hands-free.

topics.title: Hazard Lights
topics.content: Use hazard lights only in emergencies or when vehicle is stopped dangerously.

topics.title: Defensive Driving
topics.content: Always anticipate potential hazards and react early.

topics.title: Test Preparation
topics.content: Be calm, follow instructions carefully, and drive smoothly.

topics.title: Observation
topics.content: Maintain good observation by frequently checking mirrors.

topics.title: Speed Limits
topics.content: Urban roads: 50 km/h, National roads: 100 km/h, Motorways: 120 km/h.

topics.title: Traffic Lights
topics.content: Stop at red, prepare at amber, go at green if safe.

topics.title: Yellow Box
topics.content: Do not enter unless exit is clear.

topics.title: Emergency
topics.content: Stay calm, switch on hazard lights, and move to a safe place.

topics.title: Hill Start
topics.content: Use handbrake to prevent rollback while starting on a slope.

topics.title: Clutch Control
topics.content: Use clutch smoothly to control vehicle speed at low speeds.

topics.title: Blind Spots
topics.content: Always check blind spots before changing lanes.

topics.title: Safe Distance
topics.content: Maintain at least 2-second gap from the vehicle ahead.

topics.title: Motorway Driving
topics.content: Use slip roads to join and keep left unless overtaking.

topics.title: Horn Use
topics.content: Use horn only to warn others of danger.

topics.title: Engine Check
topics.content: Ensure oil, coolant, and fuel levels are adequate before driving.

topics.title: Tyres
topics.content: Check tyre pressure and tread depth regularly.
